Excellent service, a very nice place to spend the day

reviews.comment:
Mi experiencia fue Positiva , me atendieron bastante rapido . Lo unico que me llamo la atencion es que al marcardor marcaba los litros en forma lenta encambio el de la Guita pasaba bastante rapido , mas rapido que decostumbre . No quisiera pensar que esta tocado aproposito el Macador ya que seria una estafa del ACA -YPF de Santa Clara del Mar

(Translated by Google)
My experience was positive; they served me fairly quickly. The only thing that caught my attention was that the meter was displaying liters slowly, whereas the one for "Guita" was going by fairly quickly, faster than usual. I wouldn't want to think that the Macador was intentionally touched, as that would be a scam by ACA-YPF of Santa Clara del Mar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvMWVxSHNBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Hay muy buena atención del personal, pero tratándose de la única estación de servicio en tantos km a la redonda suele haber cola para gargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very attentive, but since it's the only gas station for miles around, there's usually a queue to fill up.

reviews.comment:
Fuimos y habían estado sin sistema. Una vergüenza ya que no pude cargar mis puntos ni pagar con la aplicación! No recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
We went, and they were out of service. It's a shame, since I couldn't load my points or pay with the app! I don't recommend it!

reviews.comment:
Nunca puedo utilizar el beneficio de modo y descuento de Socia del ACA. Por lo tanto decido ir a ACA Mar del Plata donde sí lo realizan sin ningún problema.

(Translated by Google)
I can never use the ACA Member discount and perk. Therefore, I decide to go to ACA Mar del Plata where they do it without any problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJZ09PS3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha gente para cargar nafta ya que es la única estación de servicio en la zona de Santa Clara y para agarrar la ruta desde ahí a la salida de la ruta 2. El baño muy sucio.

(Translated by Google)
Many people to fill up with gasoline since it is the only service station in the Santa Clara area and to take the route from there to the exit of Route 2. The bathroom is very dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJcjhmSHdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Son las 22:41 y estuvimos esperando que nos atendieran pero no había nadie. Todas las luces encendidas y los surtidores a disposición pero ningún empleado. Dice que está abierto 24 hs pero no dice que no hay playero las 24 hs 🤷🏼‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
It's 10:41 PM and we've been waiting to be served, but there's no one there. All the lights are on and the pumps are working, but there's no employee. It says it's open 24 hours, but it doesn't say there's no attendant 24 hours a day 🤷🏼‍♀️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3ajczenJRRRAB
